description: Represents the optimized compiler diagnostics, scores, and git-like branch variants of the candidate's professional resume.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for this resume variant.

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Links the resume branch variant to the owner user.

columns.name: branch_name
columns.description: Git-style branch name indicating the specific career-targeting version.

columns.name: target_role
columns.description: The specific job title or area targeted by this compiler variant.

columns.name: content_json
columns.description: Dense JSON document representing structured sections, diagnostics, custom wording, and overrides.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when this compiler variant was branch-created.

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Timestamp indicating the last compilation build or content change.
